title: woodsia obtusa
intro: Woodsia obtusa, also known as the blunt-lobed woodsia, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Woodsia obtusa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Woodsia obtusa is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations are often used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
